flow_points: Namibia scored 40 runs for 1 wicket in their Powerplay.
Netherlands responded aggressively, scoring 50 runs for 2 wickets in their Powerplay.
A Dutt delivered an economical spell, taking 1 wicket for 13 runs in 3 overs.
LV van Beek bowled a crucial spell, taking 2 wickets for just 14 runs in 3 overs.
Van Beek's impactful spell sustained significant defensive pressure, noted with an impact score of 94.3.
BFW de Leede then anchored the innings, scoring a pivotal 72 runs from 48 balls.
De Leede's contribution was substantial, accounting for 45.3% of the total runs and anchoring Netherlands' victory.
Netherlands gained significant momentum with a high-scoring finish in the Death Overs.
Their run rate of 13.33 in the Death Overs decisively shifted momentum.
